title: Update Medium for multi-channel support and rendezvous
description: Extend Medium.start_tx, get_rx_candidates, detect_activity to accept channel param. Implement rendezvous logic so RX only on expected hop channel at given SFN/time. Independent oracle for collision/propagation per channel. codereview tagged. Child of da2q.12.8
close_reason: 3 clean codereview passes achieved after updating Medium.start_tx/get_rx_candidates/detect_activity + Transmission for channel param, rendezvous filtering (expected hop channel from SFN/time), independent per-channel oracle. All tests pass, ruff clean, docstrings updated. Fixed the codereview bead project-LICHEN-0gwm.
